properties.body:
[Gulf of Finland] FINNISH NAV WARN 365/26
FINNISH NAV WARN 365/26
        SEA AREA OF KOTKA APPROACHES IS CLOSED.
        AREA IS LIMITED TO KAUNISSAAREN SELKÄ IN WEST,
        HAMINA HARBOUR IN NORTH,
        TERRITORIAL SEA LIMIT IN EAST AND
        TERRITORIAL SEA LIMIT IN SOUTH.
        FURTHER INFORMATION FROM KOTKA VTS ON VHF CHANNEL 67.
